name: Subscriber List
description: Fan/subscriber management table with filtering, search, sorting, and bulk actions. Export and messaging capabilities.

standard.description: Full data table with all subscriber info

compact.description: Responsive card grid view with subscriber info cards optimized for mobile and touch interactions

visual_brief: Data table of subscribers/fans with columns: checkbox (for bulk select), avatar, display name, email, subscription tier badge, joined date, status badge (active, cancelled, paused), and a kebab menu for actions. A header bar contains search input, tier filter dropdown, status filter, and bulk action buttons (message, export). A pagination bar at the bottom shows page controls and total count. The compact preset removes the avatar column and reduces row height.

responsive.mobile: Table becomes a card list — each subscriber as a card with avatar, name, tier, and status. Bulk actions move to a bottom action bar. Filters collapse to a filter button.
responsive.tablet: Table with horizontal scroll. Search and primary filters visible. Checkboxes and bulk actions functional.
responsive.desktop: Full table with all columns visible. Filters, search, and bulk actions in a single toolbar row.
